zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Eure於1462年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Robert Eure37歲，母親Ellen Ingleby30歲。她於1494年與Lord Ralph Millot在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1535年10月22日在英國英格蘭達勒姆享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Eure于1462年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Robert Eure37岁，母亲Ellen Ingleby30岁。她于1494年与Lord Ralph Millot在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1535年10月22日在英国英格兰達勒姆享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ewer
meanings: English (Hertfordshire, Middlesex, and Buckinghamshire): occupational name from Middle English ewere, a shortened form of ewerer ‘servant who supplied guests at the table with water to wash their hands’. The word ewerer is itself a derivative of Old French and Middle English ewer ‘water pitcher’, also recorded in Middle English as ower. Compare Lower .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Eure was born in 1462, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert Eure, was 37 and her mother, Ellen Ingleby, was 30. She married Lord Ralph Millot in 1494, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 22 October 1535, in Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Eure est née en 1462, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Eure, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Ellen Ingleby, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Ralph Millot en 1494, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 octobre 1535, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Eure 1462 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Eure 37 und ihre Mutter Ellen Ingleby 30. Sie hat 1494 in England, United Kingdom Lord Ralph Millot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. Oktober 1535 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Durham, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Eure è nata il nel 1462 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Robert Eure, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Ellen Ingleby, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Lord Ralph Millot nel 1494, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 22 ottobre 1535, nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Eureが1462年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Eureは37歳，母Ellen Inglebyは30歳であった。1494年にイギリスイギリスでLord Ralph Millotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1535年10月22日にイギリスイギリスダルハムで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Eure(이)가 1462년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Eure(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Ingleby(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lord Ralph Millot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 10월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Everingham, Yorkshire, England, United K: Everingham, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Eure nasceu em 1462, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Eure, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Ingleby, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Ralph Millot em 1494, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1535, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Eure родилась в 1462 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Eure было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Ingleby, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Ralph Millot в 1494 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 октября 1535 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Eure nació en 1462, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Eure, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Ellen Ingleby, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lord Ralph Millot en 1494, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1535, en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
